operation.command: du -sh / 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "总共占用: "$1}'; df -h / 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR==2{print "总空间: "$2, "已用: "$3, "可用: "$4, "使用率: "$5}'

risk.reason: LLM assessed: Read-only commands that display disk usage and filesystem information without modifying any data.
risk.llm_reason: Read-only commands that display disk usage and filesystem information without modifying any data.
